seoTitle: Iredale vs Iron Range — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Iredale and Iron Range. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Iredale vs Iron Range: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Iredale and Iron Range.
heading: Iredale vs Iron Range — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Iredale, Queensland and Iron Range, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Iron Range has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Iredale (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Iredale or Iron Range safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Iredale has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Iron Range scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Iredale scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Iron Range scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Iredale or Iron Range?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Iron Range has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
